name: Gully Washer Splash Park
description: Gully Washer Splash Park is a place to play pickleball in Newberry, SC. There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Amenities include restrooms. The court is free.

name: Newberry County Family YMCA
description: Newberry County Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Newberry, SC. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
